evidence.detail: Bot detector shows fakeInfluencerScore of 0.7, indicating 70% probability the account has fake/inflated influence
Bot detector engagementScore of 0.66 shows significant engagement pattern deviations from organic accounts
All Instagram posts show likes as -1 (hidden), preventing validation of engagement authenticity with 104,960 followers
TikTok shows very low engagement: 238 likes on 2.3K views (10.3% rate), 660 likes on 18.1K views (3.6% rate) - inconsistent with claimed influence
Only 1,520 subscribers on YouTube with 0 total views recorded, indicating audience doesn't convert across platforms
Bot detector shows 13.5% average engagement rate, which is far above the 1-2% benchmark for mid-tier accounts (104K followers)
Instagram account is verified, which adds some credibility to the profile
